scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently -k -n functions,web -c blue,green "npm run serve -w functions" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w functions && npm run build -w web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w functions && npm run lint -w web
scripts.test: npm run build -w shared && npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w functions && npm run test -w web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w shared && npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w functions && npm run typecheck -w web
scripts.emulators: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w functions && firebase emulators:start
scripts.test:rules: firebase emulators:exec --project demo-verbo-test --non-interactive --only firestore,storage "npm run test:rules -w functions"
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w functions && firebase emulators:exec --project demo-verbo-test --non-interactive --only auth,firestore,storage,functions "node functions/scripts/smoke-test.mjs"
